rulings.Case Title: RIVER PROPERTY TRUST VS. DAWN WIGGINS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 11, 2013, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT RIVER PROPERTY TRUST's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend. September 11, 2012 unapproved cross-complaint was improperly filed. Cross-complainant failed to file an approved cross complaint and failed to seek a leave to amend. (October 26, 2012 order). Cross-Complainant's argument regarding September 28, 2012 Stipulation is unpersuasive as it did not prevent Cross-Complaisant from asserting claims against Plaintiff following dismissal of First American Title. Registered of Actions does not indicate that First American Title was ever dismissed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM PFLUGH et al VS. 2-4-6-8-10-12 STEINER STREET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 11, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTs 2-4-6-8-10-12 STEINER STREET, JANNA CHOW, DEBI GUNDERS and JOHN MCLAY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Continued to October 21, 2013 on Court's own Motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID ARAKELIAN VS. WELLS FARGO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Dismiss Action For Failure To Amend Within The Time Allowed By The Court
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 11, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Amend Within The Time Allowed By The Court DENIED without prejudice. Defendant failed to sustain burden and provide evidence that Plaintiff was served with the Order Sustaining Demurrer with leave to amend. Defendant also failed to avail itself of an opportunity to provide such evidence per September 23, 2013 order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID ARAKELIAN VS. WELLS FARGO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 11, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant is entitled to attorney's fees in the amount of $1,375. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITYWIDE PROPERTIES INC. VS. TOM STEVENS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Re Restrict Access To The Record And Register Of Actions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 11, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT TOM STEVENS' Motion To Re Restrict Access To The Record And Register Of Actions Continued to October 23, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than October 15, 2013 by 4 p.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANE CRESCI VS. VORAVAN CHUNGCHANSART et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 11, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT VORAVAN CHUNGCHANSART's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. The veracity of allegations is not an issue properly raised on Demurer. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that verification of the complaint has to be made after counsel signs the complaint. Complaint is not uncertain. Counsel for defendant is ordered again (See CUD-13-464128) to comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NATHAN RONALD VOLD VS. ERIC MATA et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 11, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT ERIC MATA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Hearing Required. Plaintiff, Defendant, and Aaryn Harrison to be present. = (501/REQ)
